---
title: "VSCode Keyboard Shortcut Cheat Sheet"
date: 2022-12-23
categories:
- VScode
image: keyboard.jpg
---










```bash

######################## --------- General

Ctrl + ,                # user setting
Ctrl + Shift + P        # command palette
Ctrl + K Ctrl + S       # keyboard shortcuts

Ctrl + B                # toggle sidebar
Ctrl + P                # quick open, go to target file
Ctrl + Shift + N        # open a new vscode window
Ctrl + Shift + W        # close window
Ctrl + W                # close tab
Ctrl + K + W            # close all tabs

######################## --------- Editor

Ctrl + D                # select the word  
Ctrl + L                # Select current line
Ctrl + Shift + L        # select all same selection

Ctrl + Alt + ↑ / ↓      # Insert multiple cursor above / below, Escape exit mode

Ctrl + U                # Undo last cursor operation

Shift + Alt + L         # Split editor
CMD + \                 # Split editor 
Alt + 1/2/3             # go to different tab of editor in the same window 
Ctrl + 1/2/3            # go to different editor

Alt + ↑ / ↓             # move line up or down
Alt + Shift + Up / Down     # copy line up or down
Ctrl + Shift + K
        # delete current code line
Ctrl + Shift + ] / [    # code folding
Ctrl + ] / [            # Indent/outdent line
Ctrl + ← / →            # mouve cursor left or right between words
Ctrl + ↑ / ↓            # scroll screen
Ctrl + Shift + ← / →    # select left or right between words

Ctrl + Home or          # Go to beginning or end of file
Ctrl + /                # comment or uncomment

######################## --------- Terminal

Ctrl + `                                  # Show integrated terminal
Ctrl + Shift + `                          # Create new terminal
Ctrl + PgUp   | Cmd + Shift + ]           # Move to previous terminal
Ctrl + PgDn   | Cmd + shift + [           # Move to next terminal

Ctrl + K                # clean the terminal but remain the history information, or use clear  in the terminal, clean command history




######################## --------- Search & Replace

Ctrl + H # replace, Enter replace oen by one, Ctrl + Alt + Enter replace all 
Ctrl + F # look up
CMD + G # replcace

```
